name: scroll-spy
description: Package-specific skills for the scroll_spy Flutter package: integration, primary-selection tuning, diagnosis, performance optimization, v0.2-to-v1 migration, and visibility_detector conversion.

interface.shortDescription: Skills for the scroll_spy Flutter package.
interface.longDescription: Adds package-specific skills for scroll_spy, the viewport focus detection package for Flutter: correct integration into feeds and carousels, primary-selection stability tuning, symptom-based diagnosis, rebuild-pressure optimization, migration from 0.2.x to 1.x, and conversion from visibility_detector.
defaultPrompt: Integrate scroll_spy autoplay into my feed
My scroll_spy primary flickers while scrolling
Migrate my project from scroll_spy 0.2 to 1.0
